title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned about AI self-improvement cycles where Claude is now handling code writing, review, experiments, and AI system development. The commentary highlights that AI systems are increasingly automating the research and development process for better AI, with both Anthropic and OpenAI raising concerns about the pace of advancement.
